name: Shopkeeper Simulator VR: Refreshed
short_description: Manage your own shop in this VR tycoon game! Buy delicious items and sell them at a profit. Unlock helpful equipment to reach the end of the day!
detailed_description:
Shopkeeper Simulator VR is the only trading game for VR in which you have to run a grocery store for the long term. Earn money with food, reorder it, and unlock helpful equipment!

Features

  • Many different, delicious foods: From broccoli to meat to cheese!

  • Unlock gear for better efficiency: Store products in your fridge to keep them fresh; get notified of new customers by a doorbell and store your bundles of money in the money safe!

  • 3 difficulty levels

  • Dollhouse mode for smaller players

  • Wicked sound effects!
